title: helichrysum rosum
intro: Helichrysum rosum, also known as Immortelle or Helichrysum italicum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum rosum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin health, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Helichrysum rosum is commonly used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
